creator: markus.hoenicka@mhoenicka.de
text:
Boris,

this is the additional info pertaining to the section you mentioned in
UPDATING:

- I did not modify any relevant sysctls:
yeti# sysctl -h compat.linux.osname
compat.linux.osname: Linux
yeti# sysctl -h compat.linux.osrelease
compat.linux.osrelease: 2.4.2

- I did not set any LD_* variables:
yeti# printenv|grep LD_
yeti#

The ktrace output is available at:

http://refdb.sourceforge.net/stuff/ktrace.out

Thanks for looking into this.

Markus

Boris Samorodov writes:
 > If you've read /usr/ports/UPDATING (20060616: AFFECTS users of
 > emulation/linux_base-*) and your "printenv | grep LD_" shows nothing
 > please put ktrace.out of "ktrace -i <your_programm>" somewere at
 > http:// or ftp:// and send me a link by email.
 > 
 > WBR
 > -- 
 > bsam
 > 

-- 
Markus Hoenicka
markus.hoenicka@cats.de
(Spam-protected email: replace the quadrupeds with "mhoenicka")
http://www.mhoenicka.de
